title: best-ex-check output
description: Canonical output of the best-ex-check skill. Layer 1 (structured) consumed by UIs and downstream agents. Claude Code rendering described in references/rendering.md.

tier.description: A = full NBBO tick history from /v3/quotes; B = 1-second aggregate band as NBBO proxy

mode.description: Always exception-report; only flagged fills surface in the rendered output

file_in.description: Path to the input fill CSV

from.description: Earliest fill timestamp in the input

to.description: Latest fill timestamp in the input

flagged_count.description: Fills that hit one or more flag categories

flagged.description: Fills that hit one or more flag categories. Empty array if no breaks.

timestamp.description: Fill timestamp from the input CSV

reference_price.description: Reference inside quote at the fill timestamp (ask on a BUY, bid on a SELL)

reference_bid.description: Inside bid at the fill timestamp; null if no quote was found

reference_ask.description: Inside ask at the fill timestamp; null if no quote was found

slippage_bps.description: Signed slippage versus reference_price in basis points. Positive on a BUY = bad; negative on a SELL = bad.

spread_bps_at_fill.description: Bid-ask spread in basis points at the fill timestamp

session_vwap.description: Session VWAP up to (and including) the fill timestamp

vwap_slippage_bps.description: Slippage versus session VWAP in basis points, signed by side

adverse_selection_bps.description: Price movement against the trader in the 30 seconds AFTER fill, in basis points. Positive = adverse.

reasons.description: Flag categories triggered for this fill. At least one entry.

implementation_shortfall_usd.description: Dollar cost of the slippage on this fill: abs(slippage_bps) / 10000 * price * qty

suggested_next_action.description: Action-relevant prose for the operator (one sentence)

endpoint.description: Massive API endpoint that produced the reference quote

by_reason.description: Count of flagged fills by reason code (fills can appear under multiple reasons)

avg_crossed_spread_bps.description: Average slippage in bps across all crossed-spread fills; null if no crossed-spread fills

total_implementation_shortfall_usd.description: Sum of implementation_shortfall_usd across all flagged fills

quote_source.description: Which endpoint produced the reference NBBO. v3_quotes = Tier A; 1s_aggs_proxy = Tier B.

take.description: One-line desk-ready summary of the run

sources.description: Distinct Massive endpoints called during the run for audit trail
